title: EV Tracking Completo: Linha EV por Sessão, por Dia e na Overview
plan: Integrate get_session_ev_analysis() calls into analytics_pipeline.py to persist session-level EV data
Add daily EV aggregation logic in the pipeline to compute and store daily luck factors
Enhance data.py prepare_session_day() to include luck_factor card data and EV metrics
Enhance data.py prepare_sessions_list() to add luck column (Real-EV indicator) per day
Enhance data.py prepare_ev_data() to include daily EV breakdown table and luck trend chart data
Add Session Luck Factor card to cash/session_day.html template
Add Luck column to cash/sessions.html session list template
Add Running Luck summary card and mini EV line to cash/overview.html
Add EV per Session table and Luck Over Time trend chart to cash/ev.html
Mirror all cash template changes to tournament templates (overview, session_day, sessions, ev)
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
